  3. / How Much Does a Roof Replacement Cost in 2026?
Cost Guides 8 min read April 1, 2026

How Much Does a Roof Replacement Cost in 2026?

The average roof replacement costs between $5,500 and $12,000 for asphalt shingles on a standard 1,500 sq ft home. But costs vary widely depending on your material choice, roof size, location, and complexity.

Cost by Material (2026 Prices)

Here is what you can expect to pay for the most common roofing materials, installed:

  • Asphalt Shingles: $3.50 - $5.50 per sq ft ($5,250 - $8,250 for 1,500 sq ft)
  • Standing Seam Metal: $10 - $16 per sq ft ($15,000 - $24,000)
  • Corrugated Metal: $5 - $10 per sq ft ($7,500 - $15,000)
  • Concrete Tile: $8 - $14 per sq ft ($12,000 - $21,000)
  • Clay Tile: $12 - $25 per sq ft ($18,000 - $37,500)
  • Natural Slate: $15 - $30 per sq ft ($22,500 - $45,000)
  • Wood Shake: $8 - $14 per sq ft ($12,000 - $21,000)
  • Flat Roof (TPO/EPDM): $4 - $8 per sq ft ($6,000 - $12,000)

What Affects the Price

Six factors determine your final cost:

  1. Material type - Slate costs 5-6x more than asphalt
  2. Roof size - Measured in "squares" (100 sq ft sections)
  3. Complexity - Dormers, valleys, skylights, and steep pitches add 15-35%
  4. Location - Northeast and West Coast run 10-20% higher than Southeast
  5. Removal - Tearing off old materials adds $1-2 per sq ft
  6. Structural repairs - Rotten decking or rafters can add $1,000-$5,000

Regional Price Differences

Labor rates and material costs vary by region:

  • Southeast (FL, GA, TX): 5-10% below national average
  • Midwest (OH, MI, IL): Near national average
  • Northeast (NY, NJ, MA): 10-20% above average
  • West Coast (CA, WA): 15-25% above average
  • Mountain (CO, UT): 5-10% above average

How to Save Money

Get at least 3 quotes from verified contractors. Schedule work during the off-season (late fall or winter in most regions). Consider architectural shingles over 3-tab for better value per year of service. And always check that your contractor is licensed, insured, and has strong Google reviews.
